info.title: NuKeeper
info.description: Automagically update nuget packages in .NET projects

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: CommandLineApplication.Parse, OK: CommandLineApplication.Execute, OK: CommandLineApplication.ExecuteAsync, OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IConsole, String), OK: CommandLineApplication.ctor(IHelpTextGenerator, IConsole, String))

options.name: --version
options.description: Show version information.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

commands.name: inspect
commands.description: Checks projects existing locally for possible updates.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --change
options.description: Allowed version change: Patch, Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description: Allowed prerelease: Always, Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults to FromPrerelease.

options.name: --source
options.description: Specifies a NuGet package source to use during the operation. This setting overrides all of the sources specified in the NuGet.config files. Multiple sources can be provided by specifying this option multiple times.

options.name: --age
options.description: Exclude updates that do not meet a minimum age, in order to not consume packages immediately after they are released. Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12 hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two weeks. The default is 7 days.

options.name: --include
options.description: Only consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Do not consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed].

options.name: --logdestination
options.description: Destination for logging.

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Log to the named file.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description: Format for output.

options.name: --outputdestination
options.description: Destination for output.

options.name: --outputfile
options.description: File name for output.

options.name: --branchnametemplate
options.description: Template used for creating the branch name.

options.name: --gitclipath
options.description: Path to git to use instead of lib2gitsharp implementation

arguments.name: Path
arguments.description: The path to a .sln or project file, or to a directory containing a .NET solution/project. If none is specified, the current directory will be used.

commands.name: update
commands.description: Applies relevant updates to a local project.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --maxpackageupdates
options.description: Maximum number of package updates to make. Defaults to 1.

options.name: --change
options.description: Allowed version change: Patch, Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description: Allowed prerelease: Always, Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults to FromPrerelease.

options.name: --source
options.description: Specifies a NuGet package source to use during the operation. This setting overrides all of the sources specified in the NuGet.config files. Multiple sources can be provided by specifying this option multiple times.

options.name: --age
options.description: Exclude updates that do not meet a minimum age, in order to not consume packages immediately after they are released. Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12 hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two weeks. The default is 7 days.

options.name: --include
options.description: Only consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Do not consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed].

options.name: --logdestination
options.description: Destination for logging.

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Log to the named file.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description: Format for output.

options.name: --outputdestination
options.description: Destination for output.

options.name: --outputfile
options.description: File name for output.

options.name: --branchnametemplate
options.description: Template used for creating the branch name.

options.name: --gitclipath
options.description: Path to git to use instead of lib2gitsharp implementation

arguments.name: Path
arguments.description: The path to a .sln or project file, or to a directory containing a .NET solution/project. If none is specified, the current directory will be used.

commands.name: repo
commands.description: Performs version checks and generates pull requests for a single repository.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --setautomerge
options.description: Set automatically auto merge for created pull request. Works only for Azure Devops. Defaults to false.

options.name: --targetBranch
options.description: Use another target branch than the currently active HEAD branch of the remote or local repository

options.name: --checkout-directory
options.description: If you want NuKeeper to check out the repository to an alternate path, set it here (by default, a temporary directory is used).

options.name: --fork
options.description: Prefer to make branches on a fork of the writer repository, or on that repository itself. Allowed values are PreferFork, PreferSingleRepository, SingleRepositoryOnly.

options.name: --maxpackageupdates
options.description: The maximum number of package updates to apply on one repository. Defaults to 3.

options.name: --maxopenpullrequests
options.description: The maximum number of open pull requests for one repository. Defaults to 1 if `--consolidate` is specified, otherwise defaults to `--maxpackageupdates`.

options.name: --consolidate
options.description: Consolidate updates into a single pull request. Defaults to false.

options.name: --label
options.description: Label to apply to GitHub pull requests. Defaults to 'nukeeper'. Multiple labels can be provided by specifying this option multiple times.

options.name: --api
options.description: Api Base Url. If you are using an internal server and not a public one, you must set it to the api url of your server.

options.name: --platform
options.description: Sets the collaboration platform type. By default this is inferred from the Url.

options.name: --deletebranchaftermerge
options.description: Deletes branch created by NuKeeper after merge. Defaults to true.

options.name: --change
options.description: Allowed version change: Patch, Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description: Allowed prerelease: Always, Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults to FromPrerelease.

options.name: --source
options.description: Specifies a NuGet package source to use during the operation. This setting overrides all of the sources specified in the NuGet.config files. Multiple sources can be provided by specifying this option multiple times.

options.name: --age
options.description: Exclude updates that do not meet a minimum age, in order to not consume packages immediately after they are released. Examples: 0 = zero, 12h = 12 hours, 3d = 3 days, 2w = two weeks. The default is 7 days.

options.name: --include
options.description: Only consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Do not consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed].

options.name: --logdestination
options.description: Destination for logging.

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Log to the named file.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description: Format for output.

options.name: --outputdestination
options.description: Destination for output.

options.name: --outputfile
options.description: File name for output.

options.name: --branchnametemplate
options.description: Template used for creating the branch name.

options.name: --gitclipath
options.description: Path to git to use instead of lib2gitsharp implementation

arguments.name: Repository URI
arguments.description: The URI of the repository to scan.

arguments.name: Token
arguments.description: Personal access token to authorise access to server.

commands.name: org
commands.description: Performs version checks and generates pull requests for all repositories in a github organisation or an Azure DevOps project.

options.name: --help
options.description: Show help information.

options.name: --includerepos
options.description: Only consider repositories matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --excluderepos
options.description: Do not consider repositories matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --maxrepo
options.description: The maximum number of repositories to change. Defaults to 10.

options.name: --fork
options.description: Prefer to make branches on a fork of the writer repository, or on that repository itself. Allowed values are PreferFork, PreferSingleRepository, SingleRepositoryOnly.

options.name: --maxpackageupdates
options.description: The maximum number of package updates to apply on one repository. Defaults to 3.

options.name: --maxopenpullrequests
options.description: The maximum number of open pull requests for one repository. Defaults to 1 if `--consolidate` is specified, otherwise defaults to `--maxpackageupdates`.

options.name: --consolidate
options.description: Consolidate updates into a single pull request. Defaults to false.

options.name: --label
options.description: Label to apply to GitHub pull requests. Defaults to 'nukeeper'. Multiple labels can be provided by specifying this option multiple times.

options.name: --api
options.description: Api Base Url. If you are using an internal server and not a public one, you must set it to the api url of your server.

options.name: --platform
options.description: Sets the collaboration platform type. By default this is inferred from the Url.

options.name: --deletebranchaftermerge
options.description: Deletes branch created by NuKeeper after merge. Defaults to true.

options.name: --change
options.description: Allowed version change: Patch, Minor, Major. Defaults to Major.

options.name: --useprerelease
options.description: Allowed prerelease: Always, Never, FromPrerelease. Defaults to FromPrerelease.

options.description: Specifies a NuGet package source to use during the operation. This setting overrides all of the sources specified in the NuGet.config files. Multiple sources can be provided by specifying this option multiple times.

options.name: --include
options.description: Only consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --exclude
options.description: Do not consider packages matching this regex pattern.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Sets the verbosity level of the command. Allowed values are q[uiet], m[inimal], n[ormal], d[etailed].

options.name: --logdestination
options.description: Destination for logging.

options.name: --logfile
options.description: Log to the named file.

options.description: Format for output.

options.description: File name for output.

options.description: Template used for creating the branch name.

options.description: Path to git to use instead of lib2gitsharp implementation

arguments.description: Personal access token to authorise access to server.
